🚀 Hiring: Lead Machine Learning Engineer (Remote | Pan India | Contract Role)

🕒 Timing: 11:30 AM – 8:30 PM
📅 Experience: 10–12 Years

We are looking for an experienced Lead Machine Learning Engineer to drive AI/ML strategy, lead a team, and build scalable, production-grade machine learning systems that create real business impact.

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
Lead and mentor a team of 3–8 ML Engineers
Define and drive AI/ML strategy aligned with business goals
Architect and deliver end-to-end ML solutions at scale
Collaborate with cross-functional teams and executive stakeholders
Establish best practices for model development, deployment & monitoring
Drive ML infrastructure roadmap and innovation initiatives
Translate cutting-edge research into real-world applications
Build PoCs and influence strategic decision-making

🔹 Requirements:
10+ years of experience in ML production environments
Strong Python and data science stack (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib)
Experience with TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn
Expertise in supervised & unsupervised learning techniques
Strong foundation in statistics and scalable ML system design
Proven leadership and stakeholder management experience

📩 Interested candidates can share their resume at: k.rina@ekloudservices.com
